page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A robust and fast clustering method for amplicon-based studies.

page_metadata.biotools__summary: A robust and fast clustering method for amplicon-based studies. The purpose of this tool is to provide a novel clustering algorithm that handles massive sets of amplicons.
